mission.title: open-policy-agent-opa-: Make latency impact of decision logs predictable
mission.description: Make latency impact of decision logs predictable. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current open-policy-agent-opa- deployment
steps.description:
Verify your open-policy-agent-opa- version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n open-policy-agent-opa- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-policy-agent-opa-
helm list -n open-policy-agent-opa- 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working open-policy-agent-opa- installation.

steps.title: Review open-policy-agent-opa- configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant open-policy-agent-opa- configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n open-policy-agent-opa- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-policy-agent-opa-
kubectl get configmap -n open-policy-agent-opa- -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=open-policy-agent-opa-
```
## What is the underlying problem you're trying to solve?

The current decision log plugin runs in two variants: unbounded (all decisions are kept) and bound (decisions are discarded if the buffer has an overflow).

steps.title: Apply the fix for Make latency impact of decision logs predictable
steps.description:
### Why the changes in this PR are needed?

Decision logging is heavy on mutexes which increases the latency of decisions (see #5724) and also limits the parallelism. This PR removes two of the three Mutexes and replaces them with Golang structures for those use cases

### What are the changes in
```yaml
$ echo 'POST http://localhost:8181/v1/data/foo/allow' | vegeta attack --duration=300s -rate=500 | tee results.bin | vegeta report
Requests      [total, rate, throughput]         150000, 500.00, 500.00
Duration      [total, attack, wait]             5m0s, 5m0s, 267.833µs
Latencies     [min, mean, 50, 90, 95, 99, max]  104.541µs, 689.407µs, 341.12µs, 504.51µs, 605.328µs, 14.288ms, 77.812ms
Bytes In      [total, mean]                     23700000, 158.00
Bytes Out     [total, mean]                     0, 0.00
Success       [ratio]                           100.00%
Status Codes  [code:count]      
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n open-policy-agent-opa- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-policy-agent-opa-
kubectl get events -n open-policy-agent-opa- --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Make latency impact of decision logs predictable" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
### Why the changes in this PR are needed?

Decision logging is heavy on mutexes which increases the latency of decisions (see #5724) and also limits the parallelism.
